author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Sunrise, Shaft Produce 'Fool Night' Anime Adaptation for 2026 Premiere
Netflix announced an anime adaptation of Kasumi Yasuda's Fool Night manga at its Anime Studio Focus panel at the Annecy International Animation Film Festival on Tuesday, revealing the main cast, a teaser visual (pictured), and a teaser promotional video. The anime series, co-produced by Sunrise and Shaft, will debut worldwide exclusively on Netflix in 2026. Voice actors Kouki Uchiyama (Devilman: Crybaby), and Minako Kotobuki (Hibike! Euphonium) are starring as Toushirou Kamiya and Yomiko Ho...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'The Ribbon Hero' Unveils Additional Cast, Theme Song, Second Trailer
The official website of the The Ribbon Hero original anime movie revealed additional cast and a second trailer on Tuesday. The anime movie based on Osamu Tezuka's Ribbon no Kishi (Princess Knight) manga will debut worldwide exclusively on Netflix on August 8. Cast Pine: Seiran Kobayashi (Boku no Hero Academia 4th Season) Velvet: Kouki Uchiyama (Soul Eater) Zirco: Mayumi Shintani (FLCL) Japanese-Korean group Girls Archives. is performing the opening theme "Reborn," previewed in the...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu' Unveils Additional Staff, Third Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Almond's Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu: Imadai no Seijo wa Ane dewa Naku, Imouto no Watashi Datta Mitai desu (The Oblivious Saint Can't Contain Her Power: Forget My Sister! Turns Out I Was the Real Saint All Along!) light novel unveiled additional staff and the third promotional video on Monday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on June 30 at 10:00 p.m. on AT-X, followed by Tokyo MX, BS11...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Fuun kara no Saikyou Otoko' Reveals Main Staff, 2027 Debut
Production company Asmik Ace opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Fukufuku's Fuun kara no Saikyou Otoko (The Strongest Man, Born from Misfortune) light novel on Tuesday, revealing the main staff, an image song, and a teaser visual (pictured). The anime series will premiere in 2027. Staff Director: Shigetaka Ikeda (Future Card Buddyfight) Series Composition, Script: Aki Mizuki (Sorairo Utility (TV) script) Character Design: Yumiko Hara (Mairimashita! Iruma-kun 2nd...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Liar Game' Unveils Additional Cast, Theme Songs, Promo for Second Cour
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Shinobu Kaitani's Liar Game manga announced additional cast, theme songs, a promotional video, and key visual (pictured right) for the second cour on Monday. The second cour will begin airing on July 7 at 12:00 a.m. on TV Tokyo, followed by BS TV Tokyo. Cast Norihiko Yokoya: Natsuki Hanae (Tokyo Ghoul) Kouta Akagi: Junya Hirano (Devilman: Crybaby) Kenji Ikezoe: Tomohiro Yamaguchi (Dragon Ball Daima) Yuusuke Shibayama: Kengo Tsujii...
